# Installation > `npm install --save @types/json-schema` # Summary This package contains type definitions for json-schema (https://github.com/kriszyp/json-schema). # Details Files were exported from https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/json-schema. ### Additional Details * Last updated: Tue, 07 Nov 2023 03:09:37 GMT * Dependencies: none # Credits These definitions were written by [Boris Cherny](https://github.com/bcherny), [Lucian Buzzo](https://github.com/lucianbuzzo), [Roland Groza](https://github.com/rolandjitsu), and [Jason Kwok](https://github.com/JasonHK).
